description_long: This object consists of three wooden barrels, each featuring a classic cylindrical shape with slightly bulging sides and flat, circular ends. The barrels are constructed from vertical wooden staves, which are held together by dark metal hoops encircling the top, middle, and bottom. The wood grain is prominently visible, with natural knots and swirls adding to the rustic appearance. The barrels are open at the top, revealing the interior, and the wood appears to be untreated or only lightly finished, giving a matte look. There are no visible handles or lids, and the barrels are grouped closely together, suggesting storage or decorative use in an urban setting.
description: A group of three rustic wooden barrels with visible wood grain and dark metal hoops, open at the top and lacking handles or lids.
description_view_0: Three wooden barrels, two upright and one lying on its side, showing the open tops and prominent metal hoops.
description_view_1: Two upright barrels are visible, with the third barrel partially obscured and lying on its side behind them.
description_view_2: The barrels are seen from a different angle, highlighting the curvature of the staves and the open tops.
description_view_3: The view emphasizes the circular end of the barrel lying on its side, with the other two barrels upright and grouped behind.
